executives.name: Jeffrey Henley
executives.background: Mr. Henley has been Vice Chairman of the Board since September 2014. He served as Chairman of the Board from 2004 to 2014 and as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer from 1991 to 2004.

executives.name: Michael Boskin
executives.background: Tully M. Friedman Professor of Economics and Senior Fellow, Hoover Institution, Stanford University.

executives.name: Safra Catz
executives.background: Ms. Catz has been Oracle’s Chief Executive Officer since September 2014. She served as Oracle’s President from January 2004 to September 2014 and as Oracle’s Chief Financial Officer from 2011 to 2014 and 2005 to 2008.
